title: Dilithium/ML-DSA: The NIST Standard for Post-Quantum Digital Signatures
description: Master Dilithium (ML-DSA), the NIST-standardized post-quantum digital signature scheme. Understand the Fiat-Shamir with Aborts paradigm, rejection sampling, and how Module-LWE enables secure signatures.
learningObjectives: Explain how lattice problems enable digital signatures
Understand the Fiat-Shamir with Aborts paradigm
Implement core Dilithium algorithms (KeyGen, Sign, Verify)
Analyze rejection sampling and its security implications
Compare Dilithium parameter sets and security levels
Understand the relationship between Kyber and Dilithium
